prompt: Generate a watercolor painting of the provided video game scene, capturing its composition and mood in an artistic, non-photorealistic style.
prompt_refined: Generate a watercolor painting based on image 1. The scene features a samurai warrior, viewed from behind, positioned on a ridge in the left foreground, looking out over an expansive landscape. This landscape is composed of rolling hills with a mix of green and bright yellow autumnal trees, rocky outcrops, and a valley featuring patches of purple flowers. The upper portion of the image is dominated by a clear blue sky, with a dark, jagged peak or structure visible on the distant horizon in the upper right. The painting should faithfully capture the original composition and contemplative mood in an artistic, non-photorealistic watercolor style, emphasizing soft washes and characteristic brushstrokes.
objects: samurai warrior (viewed from behind, in left foreground)
valley with patches of purple flowers
dark, jagged peak or structure (on distant horizon, in upper right)
